key.name: auto-save
key.description: Automatically save changes to the HyprMod managed config after each modification.

key.name: config-path
key.description: Path to the HyprMod managed config file. Empty string uses the default location (~/.config/hypr/hyprland-gui.conf).

key.name: lua-migration-banner-dismissed
key.description: When true, the main-window banner that prompts users on Hyprland 0.55+ to migrate from hyprland.conf to hyprland.lua is suppressed. Set automatically when the user dismisses or completes the migration.

key.name: deprecations-banner-dismissed-hash
key.description: SHA-1 of the most-recently-dismissed deprecation scan. The banner re-appears when a fresh scan produces a different fingerprint, so newly-introduced deprecations are surfaced even after a prior dismissal.
